_comment: Gen 1 OU Chansey — opponent fixture. Normal type, burned, half HP, +3 def. High protect belief (softboiled pattern).
_note_boosts: In Gen 1 Special is one stat (spc), so spa and spd boosts are always equal.
_note_stat_belief: HP stat (703) exceeds STAT_NORM (512) so mean is capped at 1.0. Low atk std: Chansey's attack is famously low and predictable.

stat_belief._note: mean[0] capped to 1.0 (703/512 > 1). Slot 5 (spd) is 0 for gen 1.
